name: Orange Cream Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese and softened butter in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add the orange juice, honey, orange zest, and lemon juice to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Taste and adjust sweetness by adding more honey if desired.
5. Serve on pancakes, waffles, or English muffins.
